entity_types.AccountLink: A link for onboarding a connected account
entity_types.AccountSession: A session for embedded account management
entity_types.ApplicationFee: A fee collected from a connected account
entity_types.AppsSecret: An app secret for Stripe Apps
entity_types.BalanceTransaction: A transaction that affected the balance
entity_types.BillingCreditBalanceSummary: A Stripe billing credit balance summary resource
entity_types.BillingMeterEvent: A usage event recorded by a meter
entity_types.BillingMeterEventAdjustment: An adjustment to a meter event
entity_types.Capability: A capability of a connected account
entity_types.CheckoutSession: A Checkout session for collecting payments
entity_types.CreditNote: A credit note on an invoice
entity_types.CreditNoteLineItem: A Stripe credit note line item resource
entity_types.CustomerBalanceTransaction: A transaction on a customer's balance
entity_types.CustomerCashBalanceTransaction: A Stripe customer cash balance transaction resource
entity_types.Discount: A discount applied to a customer or subscription
entity_types.EphemeralKey: A short-lived API key for client-side operations
entity_types.ExternalAccount: An external account (bank or card) on a connected account
entity_types.FeeRefund: A refund of an application fee
entity_types.File: An uploaded file (identity documents, disputes, etc.)
entity_types.FileLink: A shareable link to a file
entity_types.FinancialConnectionsAccountOwner: A Stripe financial connections account owner resource
entity_types.FinancialConnectionsSession: A session for linking financial accounts
entity_types.FinancialConnectionsTransaction: A transaction from a linked account
entity_types.LinkAccountSession: A Stripe link account session resource
entity_types.LoginLink: A login link for a connected account
entity_types.PaymentAttemptRecord: A Stripe payment attempt record resource
entity_types.PaymentIntentAmountDetailsLineItem: A Stripe payment intent amount details line item resource
entity_types.PaymentLink: A payment link for collecting payments
entity_types.PaymentMethodDomain: A domain for payment method display
entity_types.Payout: A payout to an external account
entity_types.Person: A person associated with a connected account
entity_types.PromotionCode: A promotion code for a coupon
entity_types.RadarEarlyFraudWarning: An early fraud warning from Radar
entity_types.RadarPaymentEvaluation: A Stripe radar payment evaluation resource
entity_types.RadarValueList: A Radar value list for fraud rules
entity_types.RadarValueListItem: An item in a Radar value list
entity_types.SetupAttempt: An attempt to set up a payment method
entity_types.SetupIntent: A setup intent for saving payment methods
entity_types.SigmaSigmaApiQuery: A Stripe sigma sigma api query resource
entity_types.SourceMandateNotification: A Stripe source mandate notification resource
entity_types.TaxCalculationLineItem: A line item in a tax calculation
entity_types.TaxId: A tax ID for a customer
entity_types.TaxTransactionLineItem: A line item in a tax transaction
entity_types.TerminalOnboardingLink: A Stripe terminal onboarding link resource
entity_types.Token: A single-use token representing payment details
entity_types.Topup: A top-up of the Stripe balance
entity_types.Transfer: A transfer to a connected account
entity_types.TreasuryFinancialAccountFeatures: Features of a Treasury financial account
entity_types.WebhookEndpoint: A webhook endpoint for receiving events
entity_types.Platform: The Stripe platform root (starting point for listing resources)
